gist.headline: Stonks, but make it AI
gist.blurb: Quent just landed in the Greenhouse. It uses AI agents to automate trading and analyze indicators, because staring at charts all day is for humans.
gist.summary: Added Quent, an AI-powered automated trading and indicator analysis tool, to the community app showcase.
gist.impact: The community can now explore how to use AI agents for financial strategies and trading automation via the Greenhouse.
gist.visual_concept: Trading and finance theme. Polly the bee acting as a trader, looking at upward trending charts. Monitor robot as an AI agent assisting with the trades. Coins, charts, retro terminals.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny business tie, looking at a retro computer monitor showing upward trending stock charts and green pixel coins. A chunky monitor robot stands nearby holding a tiny briefcase. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny business tie, looking at a retro computer monitor showing upward trending stock charts and green pixel coins. A chunky monitor robot stands nearby holding a tiny briefcase. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
